testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: No OTP digits found in YOPmail message body for karan@yopmail.com expected object to not be null

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: No OTP digits found in YOPmail message body for karan@yopmail.com expected object to not be null at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.assertNotNull(Assert.java:1484) at com.mirra.automation.steps.SignUpSteps.i_fetch_the_otp_from_yopmail_for(SignUpSteps.java:96) at ✽.I fetch the OTP from YOPmail for "karan@yopmail.com"(classpath:features/sign_up.feature:27)
